title: WS1 token measurement display complete
body: Shaded Shrouding Mask completed WS1 only for fitness-token-measurements-and-frontmatter-mandation. Outcome: reusable Practice fitness logic now lives under agent-tools/src/practice-fitness; validate-practice-fitness is a thin wrapper; fitness reports render content-only estimated token counts using chars/4. Scope guard: no token frontmatter fields, convention docs, manifest coverage, or WS2+ work. Evidence: focused src/practice-fitness Vitest passed (4 files / 31 tests); @oaknational/agent-tools type-check, lint, and build passed; pnpm practice:fitness:informational exited 0 and rendered Tokens rows; markdownlint on the plan file passed. Claim ed9e4df9 closed.
